name: vnstock_news_deep_symbol_config
description: News config for deep symbol LLM analyzer. Uses BatchCrawler/sitemap for finance sites such as CafeF to avoid RSS feed errors.

quick.description: Fast monitoring with RSS when available; automatically falls back to BatchCrawler+sitemap for sites without RSS such as CafeF.
quick.recommended_for: Dashboard, alerting, daily monitoring, fast sanity checks.
quick.notes: RSS first for RSS-capable sites. For CafeF/sitemap-only sites, use BatchCrawler.fetch_articles with sitemap_url to get full article content and avoid No RSS URLs configured.

ml.description: Deep symbol monitoring. Uses BatchCrawler.fetch_articles(); required for CafeF because CafeF has sitemap but no RSS in local config.
ml.recommended_for: Topic classification, event-study features, keyword models, sentiment labeling workflows.

dl.description: Large text corpus for deep learning/embedding pipelines. Prefer EnhancedNewsCrawler when available; fallback to AsyncBatchCrawler or BatchCrawler according to source availability.
dl.recommended_for: Transformer fine-tuning, embedding corpora, RAG/news memory stores, long-horizon text datasets.

vnexpress.notes: Use builtin vnstock_news site config by default. Add explicit rss_urls/sitemap_urls here if you want to force a source.

cafef.notes: CafeF built-in config can raise No RSS URLs configured. Use BatchCrawler.fetch_articles(sitemap_url=https://cafef.vn/latest-news-sitemap.xml).

vneconomy.notes: Use builtin vnstock_news site config by default; fill explicit sitemap_urls if using async/enhanced mode and your local config does not expose sources.

vietstock.notes: Sitemap URL follows the documented ML dataset example.

tuoitre.notes: Example monthly sitemap from docs. Change year/month for historical backfill.

dantri.notes: Available in builtin vnstock_news config according to docs.

thoibaotaichinhvietnam.notes: Available in builtin vnstock_news config according to docs.

crawler.description: Unified simple crawler. Supports RSS and sitemap metadata fallback.

get_articles_from_feed.description: RSS feed. Fastest path for latest news. Returns List[Dict].

param_info.limit_per_feed: Maximum articles per RSS feed. Increase for broader monitoring; keep small for alerting.

get_articles.description: Smart fallback from RSS to sitemap metadata. Sitemap fallback may return only url/lastmod, not full article content.

param_info.sitemap_url: Optional string/list of sitemap URLs. Leave null/empty to use builtin site config.
param_info.limit_per_feed: Maximum entries per RSS feed when RSS is used.

batch.description: Synchronous batch crawler. Stable and resume-friendly for ML datasets.

fetch_articles.description: Fetch parsed article details from sitemap/default site config. Returns DataFrame.

param_info.sitemap_url: Optional string/list. Use explicit sitemap when you need deterministic source selection.
param_info.top_n_per_feed: Optional cap per feed if the site has multiple feeds.
param_info.within: Optional time-window filter if supported by local vnstock_news version.

fetch_articles_batch.description: Fetch in small batches for memory-safe processing. Returns iterable/list of DataFrames depending on package version.

param_info.batch_size: Number of articles in each processing batch.
param_info.max_workers: Thread workers for synchronous batch mode; keep low to avoid rate limit.

async_batch.description: Asynchronous crawler for fast multi-article collection. Requires sitemap/RSS sources.

fetch_articles_async.description: Fetch parsed article details concurrently from source URLs. Returns DataFrame.

param_info.sources: Required list of sitemap/RSS URLs for AsyncBatchCrawler.
param_info.within: Optional time-window filter if supported by local vnstock_news version.

fetch_articles_concurrently.description: Fetch detailed content from a predefined list of article URLs.

param_info.urls: Explicit article URLs. Use when you already have a URL universe from another source.
param_info.max_concurrency: Maximum concurrent article requests. Lower this if you see 403/429.

enhanced.description: Advanced async API with caching, validation, cleaning and retry support where available.

fetch_articles_async.description: Fetch articles with advanced caching/cleaning/validation. Signature may differ across package versions; get_news_layer filters kwargs safely.

param_info.sources: List of sitemap/RSS URLs. Required by most async/enhanced implementations.
param_info.site_name: Site config key, e.g. cafef, vietstock.
param_info.top_n: Maximum number of articles in signatures using top_n.
param_info.max_articles: Maximum number of articles in signatures using max_articles.
param_info.time_frame: Time window such as 24h, 7d, 30d, all where supported.
param_info.clean_content: Whether to request crawler-side content cleaning where supported.
param_info.save_to_file: Keep false; project-level output is handled by this script for consistency.

network_settings.notes: Use conservative defaults to avoid rate limiting. Increase delay/reduce concurrency if 403/429 appears.

legal_and_ethics.copyright_note: Use crawled news for research/internal analytics unless you have explicit rights for redistribution/commercial publication.
legal_and_ethics.rate_limit_note: Stop or slow down when you encounter HTTP 403/429; do not bypass technical access controls.
